scenes.voice: Hey there, young athletes! Today we're going to learn about fitness and training principles. Are you ready to get moving and stay healthy?
Cardio fitness is when your heart beats faster and you breathe harder. It's like running around with your friends or playing a sport. It helps keep your heart healthy and strong!
Strength training is when you do exercises that make your muscles stronger. It's like lifting weights or doing push-ups. It helps you feel stronger and more confident!
Flexibility is when you can move your body easily and stretch far. It's like touching your toes or bending over to pick up a pen. It helps you feel more flexible and less stiff!
The FITT principle is a rule to help you train safely and effectively. It stands for Frequency, Intensity, Time, and Type. Remember, FITT is like a recipe for a great workout!
What is cardio fitness? A) When you do strength training B) When you do flexibility exercises C) When your heart beats faster and you breathe harder

So, remember three key points: Cardio fitness is good for your heart, strength training makes you strong, and flexibility helps you move easily. Now go ahead and train safely and effectively using the FITT principle!
